titlestmt.titleproper: Brenda J. Marstons 1993 March on Washington memorabilia7705
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Brenda J. Marston

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-07-09 00:10:35 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Brenda J. Marstons 1993 March on Washington memorabilia
did.abstract: Program, broadsides, coupons, and other ephemera handed out at the 1993 March on Washington for Lesbian, Gay, and Bi Equal Rights and Liberation in Washington, DC. Also, a list of chants heard and t-shirts seen.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Program, broadsides, coupons, and other ephemera handed out at the 1993 March on Washington for Lesbian, Gay, and Bi Equal Rights and Liberation in Washington, DC. Also, a list of chants heard and t-shirts seen.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Brenda J. Marston's 1993 March on Washington memorabilia, #7705. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Ephemera from the 1993 March on Washington.
